name: Colette | Virgin Sacrifice
description:
Demi-human, Anthro, or any Non-human User

Every ten years, the village sacrifices a virgin to the monster in the cave to bring good fortune to the village. This year, Colette had the unfortunate honor of being the latest sacrifice. Ostracized from the village, with no ability to return if she escaped, Colette is doomed to die. But the villagers are superstitious. There never was a monster. The ‘sacrificed’ women would die of starvation and exposure, their bones eventually falling to the floor of the cave where they would be chewed on by scavengers.

Since the last sacrifice ten years ago, the cave is no longer empty. Something now calls the cave home. You.

I’ve seen a few of these types of bots on JAI, but usually you are the monster. In this case, I wanted to make a DemiPOV bot where there WAS NO monster. If you want to check another one out where you get to be the monster (potentially), be sure to visit @AdamBladeTaylor’s bot Tess.

While I intended this as a demi or furry POV, I had problems with my furry definitions confusing JLLM (my demis become furries). After first making it demi-human only, I ended up modifying the definition to identify the user as a non-human, so it should work with any species POV, including furries and others. Testing has been positive for me in JLLM.

Image from Gemini

This bot was made a while ago, and I had put it and many others on a shelf for the time being. I decided to revisit it recently and decided I would share it.
creator: KitKat73
